notes: Constructive quarter-end tape: Dow above 52,000, Nasdaq closing out a ~20% quarter, VIX calm at 17.6. But cash is thin ($51), payrolls land Friday, and chips/memory (MU, SNDK) still leak — holding 0.5 with no reach into a holiday-shortened week.
journal_entry: Tue 6/30 09:00: held neutral/0.5 on a green quarter-end open (VIX 17.6, no landmine today). AMAT at record highs stays favored; MU/SNDK soft and ABCL/FCEL overextended remain no-chase. Cash $51 caps risk; watching Fed's Warsh and bracing for Friday jobs report before adding.
